hotspots.label: SEISMIC ANOMALY
hotspots.summary: M5.7 event near 17 km SW of Kōya, Japan. 233 total quakes in last 24h. Monitoring tectonic drift patterns.

hotspots.label: GPS JAMMING ZONE
hotspots.summary: Sustained GPS spoofing arrays detected pulsing across Eastern Europe and Baltic shipping lanes. Assets advised to switch to INS navigation.

hotspots.label: COMMS ISOLATION
hotspots.summary: Global news networks returning sparse datastreams. Monitoring South China Sea corridor.
